tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Red colour is a symbol of danger. The sky looks blue. Green colour is a symbol of peace. He is wearing a yellow shirt. Everyone likes black colour.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: White colour represents purity. This flower is orange in colour. Purple colour is considered royal. She likes pink colour a lot. Brown coloured soil is fertile.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "अदालत में सुनवाई चल रही है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The hearing is going on in the court.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He are wearing a yellow shirt."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is wearing a yellow shirt.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The lawyer argued the case. The law is equal for everyone. There should be no delay in justice. The witness told the truth.
